---
title: "Column Name Explanations"
output: html_document
---

## Segment Group Summary:

- **seg.group**: Identifier of the segment group within a chromosome  
- **chromosome**: Chromosome name or identifier  
- **n_segments**: Number of segments in the segment group  
- **total_bp**: Total base pairs covered by all segments in the group  
- **mean_length**: Mean segment length within the group  
- **median_length**: Median segment length within the group  
- **sd_length**: Standard deviation of segment lengths  
- **min_length**: Minimum segment length  
- **q25_length**: 25th percentile of segment lengths  
- **q75_length**: 75th percentile of segment lengths  
- **max_length**: Maximum segment length  
- **mean_meth**: Mean methylation across segments in the group  
- **median_meth**: Median methylation across segments in the group  
- **sd_meth**: Standard deviation of methylation values  
- **min_meth**: Minimum methylation value  
- **q25_meth**: 25th percentile of methylation values  
- **q75_meth**: 75th percentile of methylation values  
- **max_meth**: Maximum methylation value  
- **cv_meth**: Coefficient of variation of methylation (sd_meth / mean_meth)  
- **largest_segment**: Largest segment length in the group  
- **smallest_segment**: Smallest segment length in the group  
- **prop_genome**: Proportion of genome covered (total_bp / genome_size)

---

## Chromosome Summary: 

- **chromosome**: Chromosome identifier  
- **n_segment_groups**: Number of segment groups on the chromosome  
- **n_segments**: Total number of segments on the chromosome  
- **total_bp**: Total base pair coverage across all segments  
- **mean_segment_length**: Mean segment length on the chromosome  
- **median_segment_length**: Median segment length on the chromosome  
- **sd_segment_length**: Standard deviation of segment lengths  
- **mean_methylation**: Mean methylation across all segments  
- **median_methylation**: Median methylation across all segments  

---

- Methylation stats are calculated using the segment-level mean methylation values.
